summary:
Fixed the nil-pointer panic when metrics are enabled but no metrics block exists in the JSON config.

Change made (config.go):
• After unmarshalling, if Features.EnableMetrics is true but Metrics is nil, create a default MetricsConfig (endpoint “/metrics”, interval 60 s).
• Return the config as before.

All tests in test.sh now pass:

$ ./test.sh  
PASS: Server starts and responds correctly with metrics enabled
